<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Fasalurahiman Vayalil — Sports Infrastructure Pioneer</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --green: #1a6b3c;
    --green-light: #2d9e5f;
    --gold: #c9a84c;
    --gold-light: #e8c97a;
    --dark: #0d1a13;
    --dark2: #142019;
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --cream2: #ede6d5;
    --text: #1c2b22;
    --muted: #5a7060;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--cream); color: var(--text); overflow-x: hidden; }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.2rem 4rem;
    background: rgba(13, 26, 19, 0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  }
  .nav-logo { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 3px; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { color: var(--cream); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.3s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* HERO */
  .hero { min-height: 100vh; background: var(--dark); position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 4rem; }
  .hero-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 50%, rgba(26,107,60,0.35) 0%, transparent 70%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(201,168,76,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%); }
  .hero-grid { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.04; background-image: linear-gradient(var(--green) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 60px 60px; }
  .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 700px; }
  .hero-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5.5rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05; color: var(--cream); animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.15s ease both; }
  .hero-name span { color: var(--gold); display: block; }
  .hero-sub { margin-top: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.05rem; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.65); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 520px; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease both; }
  .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.45s ease both; }
  .btn-primary { background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); padding: 0.85rem 2rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 12px) 0, 100% 12px, 100% 100%, 12px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 12px)); }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .hero-stats { position: absolute; right: 4rem; bottom: 4rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s ease both; }
  .stat-item { text-align: right; }
  .stat-num { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 3rem; line-height: 1; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 2px; }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5); margin-top: 0.2rem; }
  .hero-line { position: absolute; right: 6rem; top: 15%; height: 60%; width: 1px; background: linear-gradient(transparent, var(--gold), transparent); opacity: 0.3; }

  /* SECTIONS SHARED */
  section { padding: 7rem 4rem; }
  .section-tag { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--dark); }
  .section-divider { width: 60px; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), transparent); margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem; }

  /* ABOUT */
  #about { background: var(--cream); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; margin-top: 4rem; align-items: start; }
  .about-img-box { position: relative; }
  .about-img-placeholder { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3/4; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark) 0%, var(--green) 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 2px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.4); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .about-img-placeholder::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.1), transparent 70%); }
  .placeholder-icon { font-size: 3rem; opacity: 0.4; }
  .placeholder-text { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5); font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .about-img-accent { position: absolute; bottom: -1.5rem; right: -1.5rem; width: 60%; height: 60%; border: 2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); z-index: -1; }
  .about-text p { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.9; font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
  .about-text p strong { color: var(--text); }
  .about-highlight { background: var(--dark); padding: 1.5rem 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); }
  .about-highlight p { color: var(--cream2); margin: 0; font-style: italic; font-size: 1.05rem; }

  /* EARLY LIFE */
  #early-life { background: var(--dark); }
  #early-life .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  .timeline { position: relative; margin-top: 4rem; padding-left: 3rem; }
  .timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; background: linear-gradient(var(--gold), rgba(201,168,76,0.1)); }
  .timeline-item { position: relative; margin-bottom: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); }
  .timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; }
  .timeline-dot { position: absolute; left: -3.4rem; top: 0.3rem; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); border: 3px solid var(--dark); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--gold); }
  .timeline-year { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .timeline-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .timeline-desc { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.55); line-height: 1.8; font-size: 0.95rem; }

  /* BBM SPORTS */
  #bbm { background: var(--cream2); }
  .bbm-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .bbm-website a { color: var(--green); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 1px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--green-light); padding-bottom: 2px; transition: color 0.3s; }
  .bbm-website a:hover { color: var(--gold); border-color: var(--gold); }
  .bbm-intro { background: var(--dark); padding: 3rem; margin-bottom: 4rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .bbm-intro::before { content: 'BBM'; position: absolute; right: -0.5rem; bottom: -2rem; font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 12rem; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.04); letter-spacing: 10px; line-height: 1; }
  .bbm-intro p { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.65); line-height: 1.9; font-size: 0.97rem; }
  .bbm-intro p strong { color: var(--gold); }
  .bbm-founded { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; }
  .bbm-year { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 5rem; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1; }
  .bbm-year-label { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.4); font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .bbm-location-tag { margin-top: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--green-light); text-transform: uppercase; }
  .logo-placeholder { width: 80px; height: 80px; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); border: 1px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 1px; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.5); text-transform: uppercase; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; }

  /* COMPANY GROWTH */
  #growth { background: var(--dark2); }
  #growth .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  .growth-timeline { position: relative; margin-top: 4rem; }
  .growth-item { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-bottom: 4rem; padding-bottom: 4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); align-items: start; }
  .growth-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; }
  .growth-region { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 3px; line-height: 1.1; }
  .growth-flag { font-size: 2rem; margin-top: 0.4rem; }
  .growth-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
  .growth-desc { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.55); line-height: 1.9; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .growth-desc strong { color: var(--gold-light); }
  .growth-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .growth-tag { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green-light); border: 1px solid rgba(45,158,95,0.3); padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem; }

  /* PRESENCE */
  .presence-section { margin-top: 4rem; }
  .presence-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; color: var(--dark); }
  .countries-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; }
  .country-pill { background: var(--dark); color: var(--cream2); padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(26,107,60,0.3); position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .country-pill::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px; background: var(--gold); }
  .country-pill:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }

  /* KEY PROJECTS */
  #projects { background: var(--cream); }
  .projects-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 4rem; }
  .project-card { background: var(--dark); overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s; }
  .project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); }
  .project-img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark2) 0%, var(--green) 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .project-img-placeholder { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.4); text-align: center; padding: 1rem; }
  .project-img-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; opacity: 0.3; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .project-body { padding: 1.5rem; }
  .project-location { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .project-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .project-desc { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.45); font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .project-add { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.04); border: 1px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 2rem; }
  .project-add p { color: rgba(201,168,76,0.35); font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 1px; text-align: center; line-height: 1.8; }

  /* ACHIEVEMENTS */
  #achievements { background: var(--green); }
  #achievements .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  #achievements .section-tag { color: var(--gold-light); }
  .achievements-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 4rem; }
  .achievement-card { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); transition: all 0.3s; }
  .achievement-card:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35); transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.5); }
  .achievement-num { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 3.5rem; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1; }
  .achievement-label { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.6); font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 0.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }
  .achievement-add { margin-top: 2rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.3); grid-column: span 3; text-align: center; }
  .achievement-add p { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.35); font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 1px; }

  /* VISION */
  #vision { background: var(--dark2); }
  #vision .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  .vision-content { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-top: 4rem; max-width: 800px; }
  .vision-text p { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.65); line-height: 1.9; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .vision-quote { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--cream); line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic; border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding-left: 2rem; }
  .vision-quote span { color: var(--gold); }

  /* CONTACT */
  #contact { background: var(--dark); }
  #contact .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; margin-top: 4rem; max-width: 600px; }
  .contact-info-item { margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .contact-info-label { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .contact-info-value { color: var(--cream2); font-size: 1rem; }
  .contact-info-value a { color: var(--cream2); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; }
  .contact-info-value a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .contact-placeholder-box { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.2); }
  .contact-placeholder-box p { color: rgba(201,168,76,0.4); font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 1px; text-align: center; line-height: 2; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer { background: var(--dark); border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); padding: 2rem 4rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .footer-name { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-copy { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.25); font-size: 0.78rem; }
  .footer-link a { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.35); font-size: 0.78rem; text-decoration: none; }
  .footer-link a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 5rem 1.5rem; }
    .hero { padding: 0 1.5rem; }
    .hero-stats { display: none; }
    .about-grid, .bbm-intro, .vision-content, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
    .growth-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
    .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .achievements-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .achievement-add { grid-column: span 2; }
    .bbm-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; text-align: center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Fasalurahiman Vayalil</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#early-life">Background</a></li>
    <li><a href="#bbm">BBM Sports</a></li>
    <li><a href="#growth">Growth</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#achievements">Achievements</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1 class="hero-name">
      Fasalurahiman
      <span>Vayalil</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Founder of BBM Sports — building world-class sports infrastructure across the Middle East and South Asia since 2003.
      Over 300 projects delivered across 5 countries.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#bbm" class="btn-primary">Explore BBM Sports</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-line"></div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-num">300+</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Projects Delivered</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-num">5</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Countries</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-num">2003</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Founded in Dubai</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">Who He Is</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">A Visionary Behind<br>the Playing Field</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-img-box reveal">
      
      <div class="about-img-accent"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-text reveal">
      <p>
        <strong>Fasalurahiman Vayalil</strong> is a pioneering sports infrastructure entrepreneur whose work has shaped the physical landscape of sport across the Gulf and South Asia. Born and raised in Mukkam, Kozhikode, Kerala, he built a career defined by ambition, precision, and an enduring commitment to quality.
      </p>
      <p>
        Over more than two decades, he has overseen the delivery of more than 300 sports infrastructure projects — spanning schools, academies, multi-sport complexes, and landmark public facilities across five countries.
      </p>
      <p>
        His company, <strong>BBM Sports</strong>, founded in Dubai in 2003, has grown from a regional contractor into an internationally respected name in sports infrastructure, operating across the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Malaysia, and India.
      </p>
      <div class="about-highlight">
        <p>"Sport changes lives. The infrastructure we build is the stage on which those changes happen."</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EARLY LIFE -->
<section id="early-life">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">The Journey</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Early Life &<br>Education</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline reveal">

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-year">Childhood & Schooling</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Roots in Mukkam, Kozhikode</div>
      <div class="timeline-desc">
        Born in Kozhikode and raised in Mukkam, Kozhikode, Kerala — a region known for its strong community spirit and passion for football. He completed his schooling at MKHMMO VSS, building a solid academic foundation during his formative years in Kerala.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-year">Higher Education</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">MMO College — BA History, Travel & Tourism</div>
      <div class="timeline-desc">
        Pursued his undergraduate studies at MMO College, completing a Bachelor of Arts in History with a focus in Travel and Tourism. This broad education gave him a sharp understanding of geography, people, and global movement — skills that would serve him well as he built a business spanning multiple countries.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-year">Early Career</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Arriving in Dubai — 2000</div>
      <div class="timeline-desc">
        Moved to Dubai in 2000, joining the UAE's rapidly expanding construction and development sector. Over the following years, he gained hands-on expertise in landscaping and sports infrastructure, building a reputation for reliability and quality that would become the foundation of his own venture — BBM Sports, established in 2003.
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- BBM SPORTS -->
<section id="bbm">
  <div class="bbm-header reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-tag">The Company</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">BBM Sports</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="bbm-website">
      <a href="https://www.bbmsportz.com" target="_blank">↗ www.bbmsportz.com</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="bbm-intro reveal">
    <div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:140px;height:auto;margin-bottom:2rem;display:block;" alt="BBM Sports Logo">
      <p>
        <strong>BBM Sports</strong> was founded in Dubai in 2003 with a clear mission: to deliver sports infrastructure that meets international standards while being trusted by schools, academies, and institutions across the region.
      </p>
      <br>
      <p>
        What began as a landscaping operation has grown — through consistent quality, on-time delivery, and a client-first approach — into one of the most respected sports infrastructure companies across the Middle East and South Asia. With over 300 projects completed across 5 countries, BBM Sports continues to grow.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="bbm-founded">
      <div class="bbm-year">2003</div>
      <div class="bbm-year-label">Year of Founding</div>
      <div class="bbm-location-tag">📍 Founded in Dubai, UAE</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="presence-section reveal">
    <div class="presence-title">Global Presence</div>
    <div class="countries-grid">
      <div class="country-pill">🇦🇪 UAE</div>
      <div class="country-pill">🇶🇦 Qatar</div>
      <div class="country-pill">🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia</div>
      <div class="country-pill">🇲🇾 Malaysia</div>
      <div class="country-pill">🇮🇳 India</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- COMPANY GROWTH -->
<section id="growth">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">How It Grew</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Company<br>Growth Story</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="growth-timeline reveal">

    <div class="growth-item">
      <div>
        <div class="growth-region">UAE</div>
        <div class="growth-flag">🇦🇪</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="growth-title">Where It All Began — Landscaping to Sports</div>
        <div class="growth-desc">
          BBM Sports started with landscaping work in the UAE, and through <strong>consistent quality and trusted delivery</strong>, gradually entered the world of sports infrastructure. The company's reputation caught the attention of schools across the UAE, who began commissioning sports facilities — football pitches, courts, tracks — built to international standards.
          <br><br>
          Over time, BBM became a go-to name for sports infrastructure in UAE schools, working with institutions such as <strong>Raffles Schools, Credence High School, Indian High School (IHS), Collegiate American School, PACE International School</strong>, and many more reputed institutions across the Emirates.
        </div>
        <div class="growth-tags">
          <span class="growth-tag">Raffles Schools</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">Credence High School</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">IHS</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">Collegiate American School</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">PACE International School</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="growth-item">
      <div>
        <div class="growth-region">Qatar</div>
        <div class="growth-flag">🇶🇦</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="growth-title">Expanding Into Qatar</div>
        <div class="growth-desc">
          Building on his success in the UAE, Fasalurahiman expanded BBM Sports into Qatar. Applying the same approach — impeccable quality, on-time delivery, and a deep respect for client expectations — the company quickly built a strong reputation in Qatar's growing schools and institutions sector, becoming a trusted name for sports infrastructure across the country.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="growth-item">
      <div>
        <div class="growth-region">India</div>
        <div class="growth-flag">🇮🇳</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="growth-title">Large-Scale Infrastructure in India</div>
        <div class="growth-desc">
          In India, BBM Sports entered a new dimension — large-scale, landmark sports infrastructure. The company began delivering multi-facility sports complexes that set new benchmarks for the country, attracting some of the most prestigious clients in Indian sports.
          <br><br>
          Notable achievements include working with <strong>AC Milan Academy</strong> and <strong>Muthoot Academy</strong>. The company also built <strong>South India's biggest turf at MMO College</strong> — a full-size FIFA 11's pitch — and developed the <strong>Mogam Sports Village</strong> in Kerala, a 5-acre facility widely recognised as Kerala's first and largest sports village.
        </div>
        <div class="growth-tags">
          <span class="growth-tag">AC Milan Academy</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">Muthoot Academy</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">South India's Biggest Turf</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">Kerala's Largest Sports Village</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="growth-item">
      <div>
        <div class="growth-region">Saudi &amp; Malaysia</div>
        <div class="growth-flag">🇸🇦 🇲🇾</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="growth-title">New Frontiers — Saudi Arabia & Malaysia</div>
        <div class="growth-desc">
          Most recently, BBM Sports has extended its footprint into <strong>Saudi Arabia</strong>, where operations are active and growing, and <strong>Malaysia</strong>, the company's newest market. Both expansions reflect the growing international demand for BBM's expertise in sports infrastructure development.
        </div>
        <div class="growth-tags">
          <span class="growth-tag">Saudi Arabia — Active</span>
          <span class="growth-tag">Malaysia — Newest Market</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- KEY PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">Portfolio</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Key Projects</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid reveal">

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-img" style="background:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;" alt="MMO College Turf">
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-location">📍 Mukkam, Kerala, India</div>
        <div class="project-name">MMO College — South India's Biggest Turf</div>
        <div class="project-desc">A full-size FIFA 11's synthetic football pitch — the largest turf facility in South India at the time of completion.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-img" style="background:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;" alt="Mogam Sports Village">
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-location">📍 Mogam, Kerala, India</div>
        <div class="project-name">Mogam Sports Village</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Kerala's first and largest sports village — a 5-acre multi-facility complex that redefined community sports infrastructure in the state.</div>
      </div>
    </div>



    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-img" style="background:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;" alt="Raffles Schools Sports Facilities">
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-location">📍 UAE</div>
        <div class="project-name">Raffles Schools Sports Facilities</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Multi-sport infrastructure for one of the UAE's most prestigious school groups — part of a long track record of trusted school projects across the Emirates.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-img" style="background:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;" alt="Credence High School">
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-location">📍 Dubai, UAE</div>
        <div class="project-name">Credence High School</div>
        <div class="project-desc">Full sports infrastructure delivered for Credence High School in Dubai — a flagship school project showcasing BBM's expertise in the UAE education sector.</div>
      </div>
    </div>



  </div>
</section>

<!-- ACHIEVEMENTS -->
<section id="achievements">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">Track Record</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Key Achievements &<br>Milestones</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="achievements-grid reveal">
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-num">300+</div>
      <div class="achievement-label">Sports infrastructure projects delivered across 5 countries</div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-num">5</div>
      <div class="achievement-label">Active markets — UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Malaysia & India</div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-num">20+</div>
      <div class="achievement-label">Years of trusted delivery since founding BBM Sports in 2003</div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-num">1st</div>
      <div class="achievement-label">Developed Kerala's first and largest sports village — Mogam Sports Village (5 acres)</div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-num">#1</div>
      <div class="achievement-label">Built South India's biggest turf at MMO College — a full-size FIFA 11's pitch</div>
    </div>
    <div class="achievement-card">
      <div class="achievement-num">2003</div>
      <div class="achievement-label">Founded BBM Sports in Dubai — grew from landscaping to international sports infrastructure</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- VISION -->
<section id="vision">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">What Drives Him</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Vision &<br>Purpose</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="vision-content reveal">
    <div class="vision-text">
      <p>
        Fasalurahiman Vayalil has spent over two decades with a singular conviction: that quality sports infrastructure is not a luxury — it is a necessity for communities that want to nurture talent, promote health, and build civic pride.
      </p>
      <p>
        From the football fields of Kerala to multi-sport complexes across the Gulf, every project BBM Sports undertakes is driven by the belief that the right facility can transform how a community relates to sport — and to itself.
      </p>
      <div class="vision-quote">
        "We don't just build facilities —<br>we build <span>futures</span>."
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">Reach Out</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Contact &<br>Connect</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-grid reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="contact-info-item">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Name</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value">Fasalurahiman Vayalil</div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-info-item">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Company</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value"><a href="https://www.bbmsportz.com" target="_blank">BBM Sports — www.bbmsportz.com</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-info-item">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Based In</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value">Dubai, UAE</div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-info-item">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Phone / WhatsApp</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value"><a href="tel:+971508416859">+971 50 841 6859</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-info-item">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Email</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value"><a href="mailto:fasal3@hotmail.com">fasal3@hotmail.com</a></div>
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-name">Fasalurahiman Vayalil</div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 · BBM Sports · All Rights Reserved</div>
  <div class="footer-link"><a href="https://www.bbmsportz.com" target="_blank">bbmsportz.com ↗</a></div>
</footer>

<script>
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 80);
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
